title: neograph pipeline spec
description: Declarative pipeline definition for neograph. Validated at load time, compiled to LangGraph StateGraph.

name.description: Pipeline name. Used as the Construct name.

description.description: Human-readable description of the pipeline's purpose.

nodes.description: Node definitions. Each node is a processing step.

constructs.description: Sub-construct definitions. Groups of nodes with isolated state.

name.description: Node name. Must be unique within the pipeline.

mode.description: Execution mode. 'think' = single LLM call, 'agent' = ReAct tool loop (read-only), 'act' = ReAct with mutations, 'scripted' = deterministic function.

model.description: Model tier name (resolved from project surface). Required for think/agent/act modes.

prompt.description: Prompt template. Inline text with ${node.field} substitution, or a registered template name.

outputs.description: Output type name (resolved from project surface type registry).

inputs.description: Explicit input spec: {upstream_name: type_name}. Usually inferred from pipeline wiring.

tools.description: Tool names (resolved from project surface). For agent/act modes.

scripted_fn.description: Registered scripted function name. For scripted mode.

context.description: State field names injected verbatim into the prompt.

nodes.description: Node names (references to nodes defined in the top-level nodes array).
Ordered list of node/construct names forming the pipeline.

n.description: Number of parallel generators. Inferred from len(models) if models is set.

models.description: Model tiers for multi-model ensemble. Round-robin assignment.

merge_model.description: Model tier for LLM merge. Default: 'reason'.

over.description: Dotted path to the collection in state (e.g. 'claims.items').

key.description: Field on each item used as the dispatch key.

when.description: Condition expression. Evaluated against the node's output. True = continue looping.

on_exhaust.description: 'error' raises ExecutionError, 'last' returns the last result.

when.description: Registered condition name. When truthy, interrupt for human review.
